text_block_list.text: Peeeew... boom!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: So beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That was so beautiful! I can't believe they have fireworks and festivals
at night here! Bubblyland sure is something else!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! ♪ After dinner, how about we see who's better at candy
cutting?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooh, that sounds fun! But prepare to lose!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah! Hey, you three! I found a stall that sells shaved ice!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Come on, Sweep! Let's go get some strawberry shaved ice!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph! No thanks!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear me. Sweep Pea must still be in shock.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I bet she didn't expect Scarlet to go home.
A little earlier...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time't have as much fun as we can! Scarlet, you should hang
out with us before going back!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I have to decline.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sorry. It's not that I don't believe what you or Maruzen said.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But for me, I think the only way I can get better is by running. It's what
I've always done. Furthermore...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I have to take first place in the next race, no matter what. ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We understand. No need to apologize! Feel free to talk to me if
you're ever troubled, okay? I'll help you out whenever or wherever
you—
There you are! Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I was wondering where you went! I told you to follow me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ack! I forgot about you! Hey, wait, what are you talking about?! You're the one who ran off in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me what to do! Bleeeh!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Grr! You little...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Never mind. I can't keep wasting time here. Come on, let's hurry home, Sweep!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry about Sweep Pea. She'll be fine with me. Go ahead
and head back first so you can get your training in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I did just say I'd be willing to help you whenever and wherever,
remember? ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Thank you very much... Then I guess, um... I'll see you back at
school.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait, where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Back to the academy. I have to train... I'll see you around, Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph... What's with her looking all serious like that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Was it really okay for us to just let her go home? I hope she's not
pushing herself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet has her own way of thinking. It would be wrong to force her to
stay, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I am a little worried about her. But there are times when one
simply wants some time alone to think.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ugh, what is up with her? Scarlet's such a dummy, acting all high and mighty like that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh! I can't handle it anymore! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sweep?!
